global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with product images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock availability for ZenDrop products.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'ZenDrop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Three product images
elements.description: Three rectangular product images are displayed in the center, outlined with a subtle shadow effect.

elements.label: Product placeholder
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area next to the main product images, possibly for additional product details.

elements.label: Product placeholder
elements.description: Another small rectangular area adjacent to the main product images, likely for more product information.

elements.label: Product placeholder
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangular area below the main product images, potentially for showcasing features.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: A bold headline stating 'Limited stock Only this weekend' in a prominent font, centered at the bottom.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Start now' in a clear, inviting font.

elements.label: ZenDrop text
elements.description: The text 'ZenDrop' appears at the top in a stylish font, serving as the brand identifier.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and vibrant, ZenDrop logo, limited stock message
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, product images are centered, and the headline and CTA are at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ZenDrop, Limited stock Only this weekend, €19.99 Start now
